lines.english: What kind of race do the children compete in?
lines.chinese: 孩子们参加的是哪种比赛？
lines.raw: What kind of race do the children compete in? | 孩子们参加的是哪种比赛？

lines.english: Experiments have proved that children can be instructed in swimming at a very early age.
lines.chinese: 实验证明，孩子们可以在很小的时候就被教导游泳。
lines.raw: Experiments have proved that children can be instructed in swimming at a very early age. | 实验证明，孩子们可以在很小的时候就被教导游泳。

lines.english: At a special swimming pool in Los Angeles,
lines.chinese: 在洛杉矶的一个特殊游泳池里，
lines.raw: At a special swimming pool in Los Angeles, | 在洛杉矶的一个特殊游泳池里，

lines.english: children become expert at holding their breath under water even before they can walk.
lines.chinese: 孩子们甚至在学会走路之前就能熟练地在水下憋气。
lines.raw: children become expert at holding their breath under water even before they can walk. | 孩子们甚至在学会走路之前就能熟练地在水下憋气。

lines.english: Babies of two months old do not appear to be reluctant to enter the water.
lines.chinese: 两个月大的婴儿似乎并不抵触下水。
lines.raw: Babies of two months old do not appear to be reluctant to enter the water. | 两个月大的婴儿似乎并不抵触下水。

lines.english: It is not long before they are so accustomed to swimming that they can pick up weights from the floor of the pool.
lines.chinese: 没过多久，他们就非常适应游泳了，甚至能从泳池底部捡起重物。
lines.raw: It is not long before they are so accustomed to swimming that they can pick up weights from the floor of the pool. | 没过多久，他们就非常适应游泳了，甚至能从泳池底部捡起重物。

lines.english: A game that is very popular with these young swimmers is the underwater tricycle race.
lines.chinese: 这些小泳者非常喜欢的一项游戏是水下三轮车比赛。
lines.raw: A game that is very popular with these young swimmers is the underwater tricycle race. | 这些小泳者非常喜欢的一项游戏是水下三轮车比赛。

lines.english: Tricycles are lined up on the floor of the pool seven feet under water.
lines.chinese: 三轮车排成一列，放置在水下七英尺深的泳池底部。
lines.raw: Tricycles are lined up on the floor of the pool seven feet under water. | 三轮车排成一列，放置在水下七英尺深的泳池底部。

lines.english: The children compete against each other to reach the other end of the pool.
lines.chinese: 孩子们互相竞争，看谁先到达泳池的另一端。
lines.raw: The children compete against each other to reach the other end of the pool. | 孩子们互相竞争，看谁先到达泳池的另一端。

lines.english: Many pedal their tricycles but most of them prefer to push or drag them.
lines.chinese: 许多孩子会蹬他们的三轮车，但大多数人更喜欢推或拖它们。
lines.raw: Many pedal their tricycles but most of them prefer to push or drag them. | 许多孩子会蹬他们的三轮车，但大多数人更喜欢推或拖它们。

lines.english: Some children can cover the whole length of the pool without coming up for breath even once.
lines.chinese: 有些孩子甚至可以游完整个泳池的长度而不用浮出水面换气一次。
lines.raw: Some children can cover the whole length of the pool without coming up for breath even once. | 有些孩子甚至可以游完整个泳池的长度而不用浮出水面换气一次。

lines.english: Whether they will ever become future Olympic champions, only time will tell.
lines.chinese: 他们将来是否会成为奥运冠军，只有时间能证明。
lines.raw: Whether they will ever become future Olympic champions, only time will tell. | 他们将来是否会成为奥运冠军，只有时间能证明。

lines.english: Meanwhile, they should encourage those among us who cannot swim five yards before they are gasping for air.
lines.chinese: 同时，他们应该鼓励我们中那些游不到五码就气喘吁吁的人。
lines.raw: Meanwhile, they should encourage those among us who cannot swim five yards before they are gasping for air. | 同时，他们应该鼓励我们中那些游不到五码就气喘吁吁的人。
